mapper.select: select (select count(*) from landmark) as "landmarkCount", (select count(*) from schedule_main where schedule_visibility = 'Y' and schedule_status = 'Y') as "sharedScheduleCount", (select count(*) from travel_list where visibility = 'PUBLIC' and status = 'Y') as "reviewCount", (select count(*) from member where status = 'Y') as "memberCount" from dual

select l.content_id as contentId, l.title, l.addr1, max(dbms_lob.substr(l.firstimage, 4000, 1)) as firstimage, count(n.nice_no) as landCount from landmark l left join nice n on n.post_no = l.content_id and n.post_board_fx = 'LJ' group by l.content_id, l.title, l.addr1 order by landCount desc fetch first 4 rows only

select m.schedule_no as scheduleNo, m.schedule_title as scheduleTitle, to_char(m.schedule_startdate, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as scheduleStartdate, to_char(m.schedule_enddate, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as scheduleEnddate, (select count(*) from schedule_sub s where s.schedule_no = m.schedule_no) as placeCount, (select listagg(l.mapx || ',' || l.mapy, ';') within group (order by s.schedule_sub_seq) from schedule_sub s join landmark l on l.content_id = s.content_id where s.schedule_no = m.schedule_no and l.mapx is not null and l.mapy is not null and s.schedule_sub_date = ( select min(schedule_sub_date) from schedule_sub where schedule_no = m.schedule_no )) as coords, count(n.nice_no) as likeCount from schedule_main m left join nice n on n.post_no = m.schedule_no and n.post_board_fx = 'SR' where m.schedule_visibility = 'Y' and m.schedule_status = 'Y' group by m.schedule_no, m.schedule_title, m.schedule_startdate, m.schedule_enddate order by likeCount desc fetch first 1 row only
